The amount to be deposited as per the above details is for settlement of the documents listed below.
Supplier Master File
For any changes to your bank details, postal address, contact details, please submit via logging into Coles Supplier Portal https://www.supplierportal.coles.com.au/wps/portal or if
you do not use Coles Supplier Portal, please email any changes to supplier.masterfile@coles.com.au. A confirmation letter will be sent to you when there is a change made in bank
account details in Coles system.
To request previously issued remittance advices, please obtain via logging into Coles Supplier Portal Link:  https://www.supplierportal.coles.com.au/wps/portal or if you do not use
Coles Supplier Portal, please email any remittance requests to supplier.masterfile@coles.com.au
Accounts Investigation
Please raise an account query if you: require claim copies, dispute aclaim, or enquire about an overdue invoice relating to this payment number.
For Coles Supplier Portal Users, please refer to Coles Supplier Central Portal under: Help Centre - Claims and Remittances or Invoice, Payments and Transactions.
https://suppliercentral.coles.com.au/s/
For Non-Coles Supplier Portal Users,please email accounts.investigation@coles.com.au
Statements (not payable invoice/statement) can be emailed to: Colesaudit@coles.com.au
